hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */packages/backend/src/*|*/packages/frontend/src/*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in *.spec.ts|*.spec.tsx|*.cy.ts|*.d.ts) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; dir=$(dirname "$f"); base=$(basename "$f"); name="${base%.*}"; spec_ts="$dir/$name.spec.ts"; spec_tsx="$dir/$name.spec.tsx"; if [ ! -f "$spec_ts" ] && [ ! -f "$spec_tsx" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"TDD POLICY: No test file found for $base. Per CLAUDE.md, write tests FIRST (expected: $spec_ts). Create the test file before implementing the feature.\"}}"; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); src_changed=$(echo "$staged" | grep -E '^packages/(backend|frontend)/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' | grep -v '\.spec\.' | grep -v '\.cy\.' | head -1); test_changed=$(echo "$staged" | grep -E '\.(spec\.ts|spec\.tsx|cy\.ts)$' | head -1); if [ -n "$src_changed" ] && [ -z "$test_changed" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"TDD POLICY: Source files staged but no test files (.spec.ts/.spec.tsx/.cy.ts). Per CLAUDE.md, every change must include updated tests. Stage test files before committing.\"}"; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking tests are included in commit...
